blocks.code:
; EDIT STRATEGIES: "random", "always-rock", "copy-opponent", "anti-copy",
;                   "always-paper", "always-scissors"
(define STRAT_A "copy-opponent")
(define STRAT_B "anti-copy")

(set-random-seed! (or (get (rb-state "frame_counter.json") "frame") 0))

(define CHOICES (list "rock" "paper" "scissors"))
(define (random-choice-rps) (nth CHOICES (random 3)))

(define (play-strat strat prev-self prev-opp)
  (cond ((= strat "random") (random-choice-rps))
        ((= strat "always-rock") "rock")
        ((= strat "always-paper") "paper")
        ((= strat "always-scissors") "scissors")
        ((= strat "copy-opponent") (if prev-opp prev-opp (random-choice-rps)))
        ((= strat "anti-copy")
          (cond ((= prev-opp "rock") "paper")
                ((= prev-opp "paper") "scissors")
                ((= prev-opp "scissors") "rock")
                (else (random-choice-rps))))
        (else (random-choice-rps))))

(define (winner-of a b)
  (cond ((= a b) "tie")
        ((and (= a "rock") (= b "scissors")) "A")
        ((and (= a "paper") (= b "rock")) "A")
        ((and (= a "scissors") (= b "paper")) "A")
        (else "B")))

(define (play-n n)
  (define wins-a 0) (define wins-b 0) (define ties 0)
  (define prev-a nil) (define prev-b nil)
  (for-each (lambda (i)
    (let ((move-a (play-strat STRAT_A prev-a prev-b))
          (move-b (play-strat STRAT_B prev-b prev-a)))
      (let ((w (winner-of move-a move-b)))
        (cond ((= w "A") (set! wins-a (+ wins-a 1)))
              ((= w "B") (set! wins-b (+ wins-b 1)))
              (else (set! ties (+ ties 1)))))
      (set! prev-a move-a) (set! prev-b move-b)))
    (range 0 n))
  (list wins-a wins-b ties))

(define result (play-n 100))
(list (list "strategy-A" STRAT_A)
      (list "strategy-B" STRAT_B)
      (list "rounds" 100)
      (list "A-wins" (nth result 0))
      (list "B-wins" (nth result 1))
      (list "ties" (nth result 2))
      (list "winner" (cond ((> (nth result 0) (nth result 1)) STRAT_A)
                           ((< (nth result 0) (nth result 1)) STRAT_B)
                           (else "TIE"))))

                           (else "TIE"))))
